name: GO IRL - GitHub PR to ClickUp and Drive Sync

assignments.name: pr_title
assignments.value: feat(n8n): add mission orchestration workflow skeletons

assignments.name: pr_body
assignments.value: Dry-run payload. No external call is permitted.

parameters.jsCode:
const pr = $('Normalize PR Payload').first().json;
const resolved = $('Resolve ClickUp Upsert').first().json;
const now = new Date();
const review = now.toISOString().slice(0, 10);
const next = new Date(now.getTime() + 7 * 24 * 60 * 60 * 1000).toISOString().slice(0, 10);
const clickupOperation = String($json.clickup_operation || (resolved.clickup_task_exists ? 'update' : 'create'));
const clickupTaskId = String($json.clickup_task_id || resolved.clickup_task_id || 'pending-credential-setup');
const lines = [
  '---',
  'title: Agent Report',
  'owner: n8n Orchestration',
  'status: Draft',
  'source_of_truth: false',
  'last_review: ' + review,
  'next_review: ' + next,
  '---',
  '',
  '# Agent Report',
  '',
  '## Task',
  '',
  'Synchronize GitHub PR #' + pr.pr_number + ' with ClickUp and Google Drive.',
  '',
  '## Files inspected',
  '',
  '- GitHub PR: ' + pr.pr_url,
  '- Runtime orchestrator: ' + pr.runtime.orchestrator,
  '- Mission Intake: ' + pr.runtime.mission_intake,
  '- JSON Bridge: ' + pr.runtime.json_bridge,
  '- Runtime Workflow: ' + pr.runtime.workflow,
  '- JSON Bridge implementation history: ' + pr.runtime.pr_60,
  '- Mission Intake implementation history: ' + pr.runtime.pr_64,
  '',
  '## Findings',
  '',
  '- GitHub remains the source of truth.',
  '- PR action: ' + pr.action + '.',
  '- PR state: ' + pr.pr_state + '.',
  '- Runtime CLI is implemented in main but is not invoked by this sync workflow.',
  '- Sync key: ' + pr.sync_key + '.',
  '',
  '## Changes made',
  '',
  '- ClickUp operation: ' + clickupOperation + '.',
  '- ClickUp task ID: ' + clickupTaskId + '.',
  '- Google Drive report target: ' + pr.report_file_name + '.',
  '- No application runtime, schema, contract, auth, RLS, migration, or secret was changed.',
  '',
  '## Checks',
  '',
  '- Deterministic report generation: PASS',
  '- LLM API calls: NONE',
  '- Runtime CLI execution: NONE',
  '- Automatic GitHub write or merge: NONE',
  '',
  '## Next step',
  '',
  'Human reviews the ClickUp task and Drive report before any Runtime mission is approved.'
];
const reportMarkdown = lines.join('\n');
return [{ json: {
  ...pr,
  clickup_operation: clickupOperation,
  clickup_task_id: clickupTaskId,
  report_markdown: reportMarkdown,
  report_file_name: pr.report_file_name
} }];
